## Release Boundary

- [ ] I did not treat an integration failure, missing precondition, audit failure, or ablated diagnostic as a policy failure.
- [ ] Any policy-behavior wording is backed by claim-valid evidence or explicitly marked diagnostic.
- [ ] I did not add restricted assets, private checkpoints, raw gated scene media, tokens, credentials, or private paths.
- [ ] I ran `make cvm-check` if public docs, contract-validation matrix (CVM)
      artifacts, validation gates, or claim wording changed.
